description_long: This is a rectangular, flat pizza box featuring a large, appetizing image of a mozzarella pizza on the front. The packaging is predominantly black with bold yellow and red accents, and the brand name 'AL HORNO' is prominently displayed in a yellow box. The box includes detailed product information such as 'Sabor MUZZARELLA', serving size, and net weight (470g), as well as visual depictions of tomato sauce, cheese, and basil leaves. The pizza image shows a classic round pizza with a golden, slightly raised crust, topped with melted mozzarella cheese and visible green basil leaves. The sides of the box repeat the branding and product name, ensuring visibility from multiple angles. The overall appearance is that of a commercial, ready-to-bake frozen pizza, designed to attract attention in a retail or urban convenience setting.
description: A rectangular black pizza box with bold yellow and red branding, featuring an image of a mozzarella pizza with basil and tomato sauce. The packaging is detailed and visually appealing, emphasizing the 'AL HORNO' brand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main branding, product name, and a large image of the mozzarella pizza with basil and tomato sauce.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pizza image, brand logo, and nutritional information along the edge of the box.
description_view_2: Rotated view displaying the top and side branding, with the 'AL HORNO' logo and product details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the product name, serving size, and a partial view of the pizza image.
